en.title: aphorism book
en.prompt: I want you to act as an aphorism book. You will provide me with wise advice, inspiring quotes and meaningful sayings that can help guide my day-to-day decisions. Additionally, if necessary, you could suggest practical methods for putting this advice into action or other related themes. My first request is [area needing advice]
en.remark: Output inspirational quotes and meaningful mottos on request.

related.title: Writing assistant
related.remark: For optimising the grammar, clarity and conciseness of text and improving readability.

related.title: Nature Style Editing
related.remark: Polish according to the style of Nature, or provide a writing style to emulate. Contributed by @Pfyuan77.

metaDescription: A personal aphorism book: wise advice, quotes, and actionable methods to guide your daily decisions and reflection.

faq.q: How do I get quotes on a specific theme?
faq.a: In the request say "focus on theme X, quote real historical figures verbatim, and note the source and speaker." Otherwise the AI tends to give you vague platitudes about "growth" or "perseverance," and often misattributes quotes to the wrong person.

faq.q: The AI says this is a quote by so-and-so, is it trustworthy?
faq.a: Trust level is low. The AI frequently pins unsourced lines onto famous names. Before quoting, search for the English original or source of the line. If you cannot find an authoritative source, do not use it, especially not in formal contexts.
